CustomField.description: Shared HMAC-SHA256 secret used to sign outbound payloads and verify inbound payloads on the cross-org gantt bridge. Both peer orgs must share the same value. Empty disables the bridge regardless of EnableImmediateCrossOrgBridgeDateTime__c. Stored as plain text on a custom setting (Org-level only) — use Named Credentials for production hardening when bandwidth allows.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Shared HMAC secret for cross-org gantt bridge. Both peers must match.
CustomField.label: Cross Org Gantt Peer Secret
